calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-18-2016 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for short cause trial/Prove Up Hearing. Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Nichole Santiago, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority.
Witness Sabrina Hoang sworn and examined on behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by or on behalf of Defendant Ernesto Martinez, Jr.
Court Ordered Defendants DOES 1-10 dismissed without prejudice.
Court Granted Counsel's oral motion to amend complaint to conform to proof of testimony.

After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
The Rental Agreement is canceled. The lease is forfeited.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 795 Pacific Avenue #424, San Francisco, California 94133; County of San Francisco.
Damages $0.00
Holdover damages $1,172.00
Pre-judgment interest $0.00
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs $395.00
for a Total Judgment of $1,567.00

Judgment signed in open court.

UD COURT TRIALS
Off Calendar Apr-18-2016 Assigned To Trial Court
